heading: $ cat about.md
summary: I build backend platforms, AI workflows, and automation systems that turn messy operational problems into dependable software.
bio: I am a software engineer who likes the space where backend engineering, automation, and applied AI meet. My work is usually about taking something slow, manual, or hard to reason about and turning it into a system people can trust.

I care about clean APIs, practical architecture, readable services, and workflows that give teams better visibility into what is happening. I have worked across telecom, cloud operations, enterprise platforms, and analytics-heavy environments.

This portfolio highlights the kinds of systems I enjoy building: prompt platforms, AI assistants, anomaly detection workflows, forecasting pipelines, and tools that help engineers move faster with fewer blind spots.
